form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months ran last in a small field at Le Mans on March 4 over 3200m, 36 len behind May It Be with 59.5kg at $3.30. Previously second-up 5th of 13 at Toulouse in LR on November 30 over 2400m, 10 len behind Chestnut Rocket with 58kg at $6.50. Can't recommend.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of three-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation third of 9 at Deauville All Weather in the LR December 23 over 2500m, 2.5 len behind West Wind Blows with 58kg at $9.70. Previously first up; third of 7 at Saint-Cloud in the LR March 29 2025 over 3000m, soft track; 1.5 len behind Bel Et Bien with 57kg at $3.80. Solid return wouldn't surprise.

form.formComment: Resuming after ten months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign second of 16 at Chantilly June 1 over 2400m, a nose behind Cassius with 59kg at $6.20. Previously first up; fourth of 8 at Compiegne May 10 over 2400m, 3.5 len behind Golden Call with 56kg at $3.70. Can get the job done.

form.formComment: Resuming after a six-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation winning won by long-neck Saint-Cloud September 19 over 3100m defeating North Shore with 57kg at $2.70. At his first start favourite; won by 0.8 len Saint-Cloud March 25 2025 over 2400m slow track defeating Asmarani carrying 56kg at $15. Winning hope in a suitable contest.

form.formComment: She is resuming after a five-and-a-half months break. Not seen since winning won by 1.0 len Praha October 26 over 3200m defeating Vevoda carrying 54kg at $3.90. On debut fourth of 9 at Praha April 6 2025 over 1600m, 10 len behind Chardon with 56.5kg at $2.90. Facing a stiff test first-up.

form.formComment: Mare back from a spell of four-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign second last of 13 at Toulouse in the LR November 30 over 2400m, 51 len behind Chestnut Rocket carrying 56.5kg at $7.10. First up last campaign fourth of 15 at Saint-Cloud March 25 2025 over 2400m, soft track; 2 len behind Massimo Meridio carrying 57.5kg at $17. Useful type who should go well.

form.formComment: Resuming after a two-and-a-half years break. Finished off last preparation tenth of 13 at Kempton Park All Weather December 20 2023 over 2212m, 11 len behind Cool Legend carrying 60.5kg at $15. On debut sixth of 9 at Chelmsford November 11 2023 over 2011m, 10 len behind Al Mootamarid carrying 59kg at $17. Maybe later.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months failed to make an impression; 8th of 16 at Saint-Cloud on March 15 over 2400m, in the wet; 6 len behind Quest For Magic with 60kg at $24. Previously second-up won by a nose at Clairefontaine August 25 over 2900m defeating Ephesus carrying 56kg at $11. Fitter so can do much better.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months eased back early on 11th of 16 at Saint-Cloud on March 19 over 2000m, on a slow track; 13 len behind Modern Light carrying 58kg at $28. Previously second-up 5th of 16 at Longchamp on April 17 over 2000m, 1.1 len behind Villa Des Arts with 55kg at $20. Likely to find this out of reach.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five months. Finished off last campaign fifth of 11 at Fontainebleau in the LR November 13 over 3000m, soft track; 1.3 len behind Bel Et Bien carrying 56.5kg at $9.70. When resuming last campaign second of 10 at Longchamp in the LR September 4 over 2800m, soft track; a long neck behind Zakharova carrying 58.5kg at $4.80. Strong fresh performer who cannot be underestimated.
